title: Library Technicians
description: Assist librarians by helping readers in the use of library catalogs, databases, and indexes to locate books and other materials; and by answering questions that require only brief consultation of standard reference. Compile records; sort and shelve books or other media; remove or repair damaged books or other media; register patrons; and check materials in and out of the circulation process. Replace materials in shelving area (stacks) or files. Includes bookmobile drivers who assist with providing services in mobile libraries.

tasks.text: Reserve, circulate, renew, and discharge books and other materials.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Answer routine telephone or in-person reference inquiries, referring patrons to librarians for further assistance, when necessary.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Help patrons find and use library resources, such as reference materials, audio-visual equipment, computers, and other electronic resources and provide technical assistance when needed.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Deliver and retrieve items throughout the library by hand or using pushcart.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Process print and non-print library materials to prepare them for inclusion in library collections.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Catalogue and sort books and other print and non-print materials according to procedure and return them to shelves, files, or other designated storage areas.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Enter and update patrons' records on computers.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Provide assistance to teachers and students by locating materials and helping to complete special projects.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Compile and maintain records relating to circulation, materials, and equipment.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Take actions to halt disruption of library activities by problem patrons.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Maintain and troubleshoot problems with library equipment, including computers, photocopiers, and audio-visual equipment.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Check for damaged library materials, such as books or audio-visual equipment, and provide replacements or make repairs.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Collect fines and respond to complaints about fines.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Train other staff, volunteers, or student assistants and schedule and supervise their work.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Conduct reference searches, using printed materials and in-house and online databases.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Compile data and create statistical reports on library usage.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Design posters and special displays to promote use of library facilities or specific reading programs at libraries.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Issue identification cards to borrowers.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Review subject matter of materials to be classified and select classification numbers and headings according to classification systems.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Process interlibrary loans for patrons.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Order all print and non-print library materials, checking prices, figuring costs, preparing order slips, and making payments.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Send out notices about lost or overdue books.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Retrieve information from central databases for storage in a library's computer.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Verify bibliographical data for materials, including author, title, publisher, publication date, and edition.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Plan and conduct children's programs, community outreach programs, and other specialized programs, such as library tours.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Organize and maintain periodicals and reference materials.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Claim missing issues of periodicals and journals.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Compose explanatory summaries of contents of books and other reference materials.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Sort and deliver library mail and packages.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Operate and maintain audio-visual equipment, such as projectors, tape recorders, and videocassette recorders.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Compile bibliographies and prepare abstracts on subjects of interest to particular organizations or groups.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
